Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Michael Hoch
Message:
feat(stripe): webhook handler + ngrok tunnel for Epic Fury 2026

Router: backend/routers/stripe_webhook.py
- POST /api/stripe/webhook (wired into main.py via include_router)
- Raw request.body() before JSON parsing — required for Stripe HMAC-SHA256 [1]
- Fail-closed: missing/malformed STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET returns 500
- Idempotency guard: duplicate event_id acknowledged without reprocessing [2]
- Always 2xx for unhandled event types — prevents 72-hr retry storms [3]
- _f() helper: safe field access on stripe>=5 StripeObject + plain dicts
- 5 event handlers (TODO stubs for Epic Fury business logic):
    checkout.session.completed, invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed,
    customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted

Tunnel: scripts/start_ngrok_tunnel.sh
- Static domain: portfolio-hoch-agent-swarm.ngrok-free.dev (free, permanent)
- Webhook URL: https://portfolio-hoch-agent-swarm.ngrok-free.dev/api/stripe/webhook
- Run this to expose localhost:8000 to Stripe during development

Tests: 10 passing (all event types, unknown type, idempotency, fail-closed)

[1] https://docs.stripe.com/webhooks#verify-official-libraries
[2] https://docs.stripe.com/webhooks#handle-duplicate-events
[3] https://docs.stripe.com/webhooks#best-practices
